Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: A customer files an Insurance Claim C The process follows CR to DV to FC to CA to AP to P to N to CL There are loops DV to RDS to DV if documents incomplete and FC to II to FC if fraud check raises doubts can loop multiple times

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Need to create an accepting Petri net with Places representing states between activities Transitions labeled with activity names Arcs connecting them Initial marking token in start place Final marking token in close place

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Places needed source start after CR before DV after DV before FC after RDS back to DV check after FC before CA after II back to FC check after CA before AP after AP before P after P before N after N before CL sink closed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Transitions Insurance Claim C or just start Claim Registration CR Document Verification DV Re Document Submission RDS Fraud Check FC In depth Investigation II Claim Assessment CA Approval AP Payment P Notification N Closure CL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The flow would be source to CR to DV to if documents need resubmission RDS to DV to FC to if investigation needed II to FC to CA to AP to P to N to CL to sink
